checkin.tellMoreMood: Tell more about how you feel...
checkin.tellMoreMedication: Write a comment about your medication...
checkin.goodToHear: Great to hear! Stability is strength.
checkin.toughNow: It's tough right now. Remember that better days will come.
checkin.highEnergyLow: High energy + low mood may indicate anxiety. Try breathing calmly.
checkin.veryHighEnergy: Very high energy + mood — do you recognize this pattern?
checkin.watchSleep: Keep an eye on your sleep and try to slow down a bit.
checkin.goodDay: Looks like a good day! Enjoy it.
checkin.whichSideEffects: Which side effects have you experienced?
checkin.noActiveMeds: You have no active medications registered.
checkin.swipeToSelect: Swipe to select · tap to confirm

overview.title: Overview
overview.seePatterns: See your patterns and trends over time.

characteristics.title: Characteristics
characteristics.subtitle: Identify and learn to recognize your patterns
characteristics.sharingDesc: Choose who can see your characteristics

community.forumDesc: Read and share posts from other users. You are always anonymous if you want.
community.noThreadsYet: No threads yet. Be the first!

profile.title: My profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your profile and medical information.

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Create insightful reports based on your collected data.
reports.selectPeriodAndCategories: Select time period and which categories to include in the report
reports.moodInsightStable: You have had a stable mood during {{percentage}}% of the period. That's a good sign of balance.
reports.moodInsightElevated: You experienced elevated mood {{percentage}}% of the time. Be aware of signs of hypomania.
reports.moodInsightDepressed: You have been depressed {{percentage}}% of the period. Consider talking to your doctor about this pattern.
reports.moodInsightVarying: Your mood has varied during the period. It may be worth looking closer at what factors are affecting it.
reports.sleepInsightGood: You have slept well {{percentage}}% of the nights. Keep up your good sleep routines!
reports.sleepInsightVarying: Your sleep has been varying. {{percentage}}% bad nights can affect your mood.
reports.sleepInsightBad: You have had sleep problems {{percentage}}% of the nights. Sleep is important for your health.
reports.eatingInsightGood: You have eaten well {{percentage}}% of the days. Well done!
reports.eatingInsightBad: You have had irregular eating habits. Regular meals can stabilize your mood.
reports.exerciseInsightGood: You have exercised {{percentage}}% of the days. Exercise is good for both body and mind!
reports.exerciseInsightBad: You have exercised {{percentage}}% of the days. Even short walks can make a difference.
reports.medInsightExcellent: Excellent! You have taken your medication {{percentage}}% of the days.
reports.medInsightGood: You have taken your medication {{percentage}}% of the days. Try to be more consistent.
reports.medInsightBad: You have missed medication often. Regular medication is important for your treatment.

notifications.remindersDesc: Get daily reminders to check in and take your medications
notifications.browserNotSupported: Your browser does not support push notifications.
notifications.notificationsBlocked: You have blocked notifications. Change your browser settings to enable reminders.
notifications.remindersEnabledDesc: You will now receive reminders for check-ins and medications.
notifications.remindToCheckin: Remind me to register my mood

delegateSection.title: Delegates

delegateSection.name: Name
delegateSection.addAssistant: Add an assistant or nurse to share messages.
delegateSection.removeDelegateDesc: will no longer be able to see or reply to messages.

diagnosesSection.startTyping: Start typing to see suggestions, or type in your diagnosis and click add.

customQuestions.subtitle: Add your own yes/no questions to your daily check-in

gdpr.description: Download all your data in accordance with GDPR. You can choose between JSON (machine-readable) or PDF (readable).
gdpr.jsonDownloaded: Your data has been downloaded as JSON.
gdpr.pdfDownloaded: Your data has been downloaded as PDF.
gdpr.name: Name:
gdpr.andMore: ... and {{count}} more (see JSON export for full data)

forPatients.heroDesc: Take control of your wellbeing with a tool designed for you living with bipolar disorder.
forPatients.featuresTitle: Everything you need to feel better
forPatients.dailyCheckinDesc: Log your mood, sleep, diet and exercise in under a minute each day.
forPatients.visualizePatternsDesc: See trends and patterns in your mood over weeks, months and years.
forPatients.medicationTrackingDesc: Keep track of your medications and see how they affect your mood.
forPatients.chatWithDoctorDesc: Communicate securely with your healthcare provider directly in the app.
forPatients.shareOnTermsDesc: You decide which data is shared with your doctor and relatives.
forPatients.simpleSecureDesc: Intuitive design and bank-grade security for your peace of mind.
forPatients.step1Desc: Register for free and choose which categories to track (mood, sleep, diet, exercise, medication).
forPatients.step2Desc: Take a minute every day to log how you feel. It takes less time than brushing your teeth!
forPatients.step3Desc: See how your mood develops over time and identify triggers and positive factors.
forPatients.step4Desc: Invite your doctor and choose which data to share for better appointments.
forPatients.readyDesc: Create a free account and start logging your mood today.

forRelatives.heroDesc: Be a better support for your loved one by understanding how they feel — on their terms.
forRelatives.followMoodDesc: See how your loved one is feeling without having to ask every day.
forRelatives.generateReportsDesc: Create reports to discuss with healthcare providers.
forRelatives.ownNotesDesc: Add your own observations linked to specific dates.
forRelatives.stayUpdatedDesc: Get a sense of patterns and trends over time.
forRelatives.respectsPrivacyDesc: You only see the data your loved one has chosen to share.
forRelatives.supportRightDesc: Better understanding leads to better support.
forRelatives.weUnderstandP1: Being a relative of someone with bipolar disorder can be challenging. You want to help, but don't always know how — or don't want to be intrusive by constantly asking "how are you?".
forRelatives.weUnderstandP2: With this platform, your loved one can choose to share their mood with you. You get insight into how they're feeling without having to ask, and can be a better support when it really matters.
forRelatives.weUnderstandP3: You can also add your own notes — perhaps you noticed your loved one seemed sad during a call? These observations can be valuable for understanding patterns over time.
forRelatives.step1Desc: Register and indicate that you are a relative.
forRelatives.step2Title: Get invited or send a request
forRelatives.step2Desc: Your loved one can invite you, or you can send a request to them.
forRelatives.step3Desc: See the data they've chosen to share with you — mood, sleep, diet, exercise or medication.
forRelatives.step4Desc: Double-click on a date to add your own notes.
forRelatives.wantToSupport: Want to support your loved one?
forRelatives.wantToSupportDesc: Create a relative account today and take the first step towards better understanding.

insights.title: Insights
insights.needMoreDays: You need at least 3 days of check-ins to generate insights.
insights.personalObservations: Get personal observations based on your patterns — without sharing data with third parties.

doctor.chatSecure: Chat with users in a GDPR-secure way.
doctor.userDecides: The user always decides which data is shared.
doctor.usersChooseData: Users decide which data to share with you

relative.notifyLowMood: Relative gets notified if you check in as "Very low"
relative.betterUnderstanding: Better understanding leads to better support.
relative.seeSharedData: You only see the data your loved one has chosen to share.

connections.youDecideWhatToShare: You decide which data to share with your doctor and relatives.
connections.userEntersEmail: The user enters your email in their app
connections.skipInviteLater: You can skip this and invite people later

badDay.title: Tough days
badDay.message: It's okay to have a bad day. Better days will come.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Log your mood, sleep, diet, exercise and medication in under a minute. It's simple, fast and entirely on your terms.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Toddy analyzes your check-ins and shows trends over time — so you can understand what affects you.
howItWorks.step3Title: Share with care and loved ones
howItWorks.step3Desc: Choose which data to share with doctors and relatives. You always have full control.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Customizable notifications help you keep your routine without being intrusive.
howItWorks.secureData: All data is encrypted and stored securely. You always decide who sees what.

footer.tagline: Your personal mood diary – created by and for people with bipolar disorder.

doctorOnboarding.toddyHelps: Toddy helps you follow your users' wellbeing between visits
doctorOnboarding.manageUsersDesc: Receive connection requests and manage your contacts
doctorOnboarding.realtimeOverviewDesc: See mood, sleep, diet and exercise visualized
doctorOnboarding.secureCommunicationDesc: Communicate directly with your users in a secure environment
doctorOnboarding.userControlDesc: Users decide for themselves what data they share with you
doctorOnboarding.easyToGetStarted: Easy to get started with your users
doctorOnboarding.userInvitesYouDesc: The user enters your email address in their app
doctorOnboarding.youApproveConnectionDesc: The request appears on your dashboard
doctorOnboarding.followUserMoodDesc: See statistics and trends in real time
doctorOnboarding.usersFoundViaEmail: Your users find you via email
doctorOnboarding.sameEmailAsRegistered: They enter the same email address you registered with
doctorOnboarding.nextStep1: Give your email address to users who want to connect
doctorOnboarding.nextStep2: Approve connection requests on your dashboard
doctorOnboarding.privacyNote: You can only see data that the user has actively chosen to share with you.
doctorOnboarding.dashboardReady: Your doctor dashboard is now ready.

doctorHome.wantsToShareData: Wants to share their data with you
doctorHome.usersWillAppearHere: When users invite you they will appear here.
doctorHome.howItWorksInfo1: Users invite you by entering your email address
doctorHome.howItWorksInfo2: You approve or reject requests above
doctorHome.howItWorksInfo3: Once a connection is approved you can see the shared data
doctorHome.howItWorksInfo4: The user controls what data is shared with you

doctorDashboard.seeOverview: See an overview of your users' wellbeing
doctorDashboard.enterUserEmail: Enter the user's email address to send a request to access their data.
doctorDashboard.userWillApproveOrReject: The user will be able to approve or reject your request and choose what data to share with you.
doctorDashboard.wantsToShareData: Wants to share their data with you
doctorDashboard.requestAccessOrWait: Request access to users or wait for them to invite you.

forCaregivers.title: For caregivers
forCaregivers.heroDesc: Get better insight into your users' wellbeing between visits and improve the quality of care.
forCaregivers.realtimeInsightsDesc: See the user's wellbeing in real time without waiting for the next visit.
forCaregivers.secureCommunicationDesc: Chat with users in a GDPR-safe way.
forCaregivers.delegateTasksDesc: Let colleagues help follow up with users.
forCaregivers.saveTimeDesc: Less administration, more time for care.
forCaregivers.userControlDesc: The user always decides what data is shared.
forCaregivers.step1Desc: Register as a doctor and verify your identity for secure access.
forCaregivers.step2Desc: Send invitations to users or accept requests from them.
forCaregivers.step3Desc: See daily check-ins, patterns and trends in a clear dashboard.
forCaregivers.step4Desc: Use the built-in chat to follow up when needed.
forCaregivers.ctaDesc: Create a caregiver account and start using the platform today.
